settings.heading: Preserving Tradition, Promoting Wellness.
settings.subtext: Rooted in five thousand years of Indian tradition. Every product we offer is personally selected to bring authentic, time-honoured essentials into your home.

settings.heading: A Devotion Turned into a Mission
settings.body:
Viha Heritage Store was born from a deep reverence for Indian spiritual traditions and holistic wellness. Mrs Anitha Kuppusamy grew up immersed in the rituals, fragrances, and sacred craftsmanship of Tamil Nadu — and she recognised that these treasures deserved to reach devotees worldwide.

Every product we offer — from sacred brass idols to handcrafted Ayurvedic soaps — is personally selected and curated to bring authentic, time-honoured essentials into your home. We source directly from master craftsmen and traditional healers who have practised their trade for generations.

Rooted in Tamil Nadu's rich cultural heritage, Viha is more than a store. It is a living bridge between the wisdom of our ancestors and the needs of contemporary devotees worldwide.
settings.quote: Authenticity is not a feature. It is the foundation.

settings.title: Authentic Sourcing
settings.description: Direct from master craftsmen and traditional healers across India — never mass-produced, never compromised.

settings.title: Sacred Craftsmanship
settings.description: Every item is hand-selected for energy, intention, and quality by Mrs Anitha Kuppusamy personally.

settings.title: Heritage Preservation
settings.description: We document and preserve endangered craft traditions by ensuring artisans receive fair trade prices.

settings.title: Holistic Wellness
settings.description: Rooted in Ayurveda and Siddha medicine — products that nourish body, mind, and spirit together.
Founded in Chennai, Tamil Nadu — Mrs. Anitha Kuppusamy begins curating sacred essentials from traditional artisans.
Expanded to international shipping — serving the Indian diaspora across USA, UK, Canada and UAE.
Crossed 50,000+ happy customers — trust built through authentic products and devotion to quality.
Ships to 6 countries — delivering sacred traditions to devotees worldwide, every single day.

settings.heading: Begin Your Sacred Journey
settings.subtext: Explore our carefully curated collection of authentic spiritual essentials, Ayurvedic wellness products and handcrafted jewellery.
